task: Parse an AWS S3 bucket name from a full S3 URI (e.g., 's3://my-bucket-name/path/to/object')
solution_criteria: A regular expression that captures only the bucket name portion of an S3 URI, ignoring the 's3://' prefix and any path after the bucket name. Should match valid bucket names containing lowercase letters, numbers, and hyphens.

task: Create a Python function that validates an AWS IAM role ARN format and returns True if valid, False otherwise
solution_criteria: A function that accepts a string parameter and returns a boolean. Should verify the ARN follows the pattern 'arn:aws:iam::ACCOUNT_ID:role/ROLE_NAME' where ACCOUNT_ID is 12 digits and ROLE_NAME contains valid characters. Returns True for valid ARNs, False for invalid ones.

task: Generate a JSON CloudFormation parameter object for an EC2 instance type with allowed values and a default value
solution_criteria: A valid JSON object defining a CloudFormation parameter that specifies an EC2 instance type, includes an AllowedValues property with at least 3 common instance types (e.g., t2.micro, t2.small, m5.large), includes a Default property, and proper Type and Description fields.
